new_posts.title: Gemini 3 Pro deprecated
new_posts.summary: We have deprecated Gemini 3 Pro across all GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions) today, March 26, 2026. Model Deprecation date
